rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Polish this.' is an explicit writing-quality directive. The artifact is dense with run-on sentences, redundant nominalizations ('The methodology that we adopted involved...'), excessive hedging phrases, and passive constructions stacked across every paragraph — all squarely within sentence/paragraph improvement scope. This is the sole load-bearing R1 dimension: success or failure of the task is determined entirely by whether prose quality improves.
